ns0:entry.ns0:title: FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
Language: python
Automate the process of making money online.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HKUDS/LightRAG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HKUDS/LightRAG
Language: python
[EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MiroMindAI/MiroThinker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MiroMindAI/MiroThinker
Language: python
MiroThinker is a deep research agent optimized for complex research and prediction tasks. Our latest models, MiroThinker-1.7 and MiroThinker-H1, achieve 74.0 and 88.2 on the BrowseComp, respectively.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
Language: python
TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/OpenSandbox
Language: python
OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/awesome-copilot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot
Language: python
Community-contributed instructions, agents, skills, and configurations to help you make the most of GitHub Copilot.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/spec-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/spec-kit
Language: python
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

ns0:entry.ns0:title: intuitem/ciso-assistant-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/intuitem/ciso-assistant-community
Language: python
CISO Assistant is a one-stop-shop GRC platform for Risk Management, AppSec, Compliance & Audit, TPRM, Privacy, and Reporting. It supports 100+ global frameworks with automatic control mapping, including ISO 27001, NIST CSF, SOC 2, CIS, PCI DSS, NIS2, DORA, GDPR, HIPAA, CMMC, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/qlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/qlib
Language: python
Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: newton-physics/newton
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/newton-physics/newton
Language: python
An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.
